label: Twitter/X — Timeline & Trend Browser
description: Extracted from: proxidize/x-scraper, ScrapeClaw twitter-scraper, hermes-agent X-reader spec, ceki-session analysis (101 mentions across agents). Verified 2026-07-16: 6190px landing page with login gate (Continue with phone/Google/Apple). Login required for timeline content. Russian locale by default. Phone-gate: sometimes required for registration (IP-dependent), but often email-only works. OAuth via Google/Apple available.
source_patterns: Timeline: fast vertical scroll, 1-2 tweets visible at a time
'Show more' / 'Show replies' click + wait 1-2s for content expand
Trend search: click trend → 2-4s page load → scroll results

active_hours.description: News-driven — peaks in morning, lunch, evening

scroll.description: Fast timeline scroll — short content, quick scanning. Source: x-scraper patterns

login.note: Phone sometimes required for new accounts (bot suspicion). If phone gate appears — try OAuth with Google/Apple instead of email+password. Existing sessions rarely hit phone-gate on login, only on registration.

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate timeline → scroll 3-5 passes → pause on interesting tweet → click expand → read → like | reply → scroll more
